title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Having Many Friends
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Having Many Friends.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Having Many Friends.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Having Many Friends': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
